summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, ranging from #106 through #117. He logged 2 hrs 30 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 15 mins. His tracked work was primarily in Java, followed by Python and Markdown.
